_comment: Copy this to config.json and edit it. MODELS use OpenRouter slugs; the exact slugs change over time, so verify them against https://openrouter.ai/models. Keep the panel small (cheap) and representative. ENTITIES are whatever you want to track, each with a ground_truth description the grader judges answers against.

entities.name: Ada Lovelace
entities.ground_truth: Nineteenth-century English mathematician; wrote what is often called the first algorithm intended for a machine (Charles Babbage's Analytical Engine). Daughter of Lord Byron. NOT a contemporary software company or product.

entities.name: Your Project Name
entities.ground_truth: Replace this with what the entity actually is, in one or two sentences, including a NOT clause that rules out the confusions you expect the models to make.
